name: coTfsSDOSetSdoAbortOnError
title: coTfsSDOSetSdoAbortOnError
description: This function enables/disables sending a SDO abort code by the test module if a SDO access by SDO Level 2 functions or other test functions, that implicitly uses the SDO functionality, has failed. The setting is used until a new call of this function. For this the node-ID of the test module and the SDO abort code 0x8000 0000 (general error) is used.
